# Case C — generic "permission" 단어만 있는 샘플 (strict-anchor 차단 대상)
# denialRegex: /^Shell command permission check failed.*requires approval/im 에 매칭 안 됨

Error: permission denied to read file /etc/shadow
Warning: permission bits 0777 are too permissive
axhub: insufficient permission for operation
INFO: checking permission scope for token

# Case D — wording 변경 fuzz: "Shell command" prefix 없이 "permission check failed" 만
permission check failed for pattern "axhub-helpers preflight": requires user approval
command requires approval but permission check failed
failed: permission was not granted to run this command
